title: receipts replayed slice (M6)
manager: Receipts — attestations about a single run: "this run of machine@hash satisfied property φ, at this authenticity tier, for this subject." The `replayed` tier ships first, and v13's recorded-effect ledger is what makes even hooked machines attestable. Receipts are diplomas for computations: compliance gates, agent-to-agent trust, provable claims about what a specific run actually did — with tiers that can't be faked because the evidence is what produces them.
cs: record per receipts §5 (signed core + optional bundle); issuance = replay + φ-gate + sign (false claims unmintable); `replayed` tier first (v13 ledger, W9.2); jssm twin #830.
